prompt: I have a custom NPC in AzerothCore with creature_template entry 800001. Write the Eluna lua so that talking to it opens a gossip menu with three options: teleport to Stormwind, teleport to Orgrimmar, and repair all my gear. Make the menu close after picking an option.

assertions.text: Registers gossip hello (1) and select (2) via RegisterCreatureGossipEvent on entry 800001
Hello builds menu with GossipMenuAddItem + GossipSendMenu
Select dispatches on intid and calls GossipComplete to close
Teleport uses Teleport(mapId,x,y,z,o) with plausible SW/Org coords
Repair uses a real durability method (DurabilityRepairAll)
All callbacks include leading event param, only real methods
